13\107\050\053\072\061\061";"\065\101\077\111\101\120\077\068\113\047\122\115\043\048\052\122\077\049\061\061"}local function V(V)return E[V-(11710+31537)]end for V,B in ipairs({{469222+-469221;1007230-1006474},{317340+-317339;827460-826860};{-388242+388843;838969-838213}})do while B[-639319+639320]<B[-814072+814074]do return K(x)end,function(E,V)local K=R(V)local o=function(o,S,X)return B(E,{o,S,X},V,K)end return o end,function()t=(252152-252151)+t k[t]=-64593-(-64594)return t end return(f(8768828-(-424341),{}))(K(x))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[V(959034+-915115)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
